goal: Fix infrastructure bugs that break colony seal: state-mutate panic on nested fields, chamber-create path doubling in entomb YAML, and XML export output format quirks

phases.name: Fix state-mutate panic on nested fields
phases.description: The setNestedFieldJSON function uses sjson.SetBytes which wraps string values in quotes, corrupting nested object/array paths. When seal.md calls state-mutate with nested dot-paths, the value gets double-quoted instead of properly set.

tasks.goal: Write failing test for state-mutate --field with nested path
hints: Test --field plan.confidence --value 85 sets numeric 85 not quoted string
success_criteria: Test fails: nested field produces double-quoted values

tasks.goal: Fix setNestedFieldJSON to detect JSON values and use sjson.SetRawBytes
hints: Try json.Unmarshal first; if valid JSON use SetRawBytes

tasks.goal: Run state test suite

phases.name: Fix XML archive export format and output handling
phases.description: The export archive command passes nil to export functions instead of loading actual colony data. Alias commands use --output flag but seal.md/entomb.md pass positional paths.

tasks.goal: Write failing test for colony-archive-xml with --output and positional arg
hints: Archive produces valid XML with header

tasks.goal: Fix runExportArchive to load data and produce combined XML. Update aliases to accept positional arg
hints: Load pheromones, instincts, registry from store/hub

tasks.goal: Run exchange/alias test suite

phases.name: Fix generate-commit-message seal/milestone types
phases.description: Go command only accepts 6 conventional commit types. seal.md calls with type seal which gets rejected.

tasks.goal: Write failing test for seal/milestone/pause/contextual types
Add seal/milestone/pause/contextual to validCommitTypes in cmd/generate_cmds.go line 41
Run generate test suite

phases.name: Fix learning-check-promotion --all and learning-promote-auto stub
phases.description: learning-check-promotion requires --observation-id but seal.md calls without args. learning-promote-auto is a stub that counts but never promotes.

tasks.goal: Write failing tests: --all returns eligible, promote-auto creates instincts
success_criteria: Tests fail: --all not recognized, no instincts created

tasks.goal: Add --all flag to learning-check-promotion. Fix promote-auto to call PromoteService.Promote()
Run learning test suite

phases.name: Fix chamber-create path doubling and verify chamber integrity
phases.description: entomb.md calls chamber-create with full path but Go command prepends .aether/chambers/. Fix entomb.md to use --name flag.

tasks.goal: Verify existing chamber tests cover path construction
Fix entomb.md Steps 6 and 8 to use Go flag syntax
Run chamber tests

phases.name: Migrate seal.md from shell to Go binary calls
phases.description: seal.md has 25 aether-utils.sh references. Convert all to aether subcommand with flag syntax. Add --active flag to registry-add.

tasks.goal: Convert seal.md Steps 2,3.5,5.5: milestone-detect, generate-ant-name, spawn-log, spawn-complete to flags
success_criteria: Steps use aether binary with flags

tasks.goal: Convert seal.md Step 3.6 learning commands
Convert seal.md Steps 4,4.4,5: activity-log, validate-state, state-checkpoint. Add --active to registry-add
success_criteria: Steps use Go flags, registry-add supports --active

tasks.goal: Convert seal.md Steps 5.1,5.2,6.5,7.5: changelog, registry, XML exports, midden, commit-msg, hive-promote

phases.name: Migrate entomb.md from shell to Go binary calls
phases.description: entomb.md has 8 aether-utils.sh references. Convert all to Go binary calls.

tasks.goal: Convert all 8 entomb.md shell references to Go binary calls

phases.name: Integration verification
phases.description: Run full test suite, verify no shell references remain, build and smoke-test binary.

tasks.goal: Run full test suite with race detection
Verify zero shell references in seal.md and entomb.md
Build binary and smoke-test modified commands
hints: go build ./cmd/aether, test --help for new flags

phase_learnings.phase_name: Fix state-mutate panic on nested fields

learnings.claim: When setting nested JSON fields via sjson, use SetRawBytes for raw JSON values (numbers, booleans, null, objects, arrays) and SetBytes only for plain strings — json.Unmarshal first to detect the type
learnings.evidence: 3 targeted tests pass: numeric values stored as numbers not quoted strings, deep nested paths work, array-indexed paths work

phase_learnings.phase_name: Fix XML archive export format and output handling

learnings.claim: When building colony archive XML exports, load actual data from colony store (pheromones.json, instincts.json) and hub store (registry/colonies.json) rather than passing nil — use struct-based XML unmarshal round-trip for reliable output
learnings.evidence: 3 tests pass: output flag, positional arg, all sections present. Archive produces valid XML with pheromones, wisdom, and registry sections.

learnings.claim: Cobra sticky-flag problem: flag values persist across Execute() calls on the same Command struct. Prefer positional args over --output flag to avoid stale flag values in alias commands
learnings.evidence: TestColonyArchiveXMLPositionalArg passes with positional arg taking priority over --output flag

learnings.claim: When extending conventional commit type allowlists in Cobra commands, update both the validation slice and the --flag help string to prevent drift — use a derived help string from the slice
learnings.evidence: Added seal/milestone/pause/contextual to validCommitTypes; Auditor flagged help string duplication as MEDIUM; tests confirm all 4 new types work

phase_learnings.phase_name: Fix chamber-create path doubling and verify chamber integrity

learnings.claim: chamber-create and chamber-verify commands correctly construct paths using filepath.Join(aetherRoot, .aether, chambers, name)
learnings.evidence: All 8 chamber tests pass, entomb.md uses --name flag correctly
